data.body: Ticket 1aa8 re-cert round-2 PASSed after: precise 'semantically empty' field-level definition, audit note on shipped ACs 1-5, code_review/plan_review outcome_counts wiring gap spun off as discovered_from follow-up c2c5-53a7-2ce0-4d98, empty-vs-recovered clarification. Claimed, confirmed change 8417c4be4 reachable from HEAD, closed 1aa8-cdde-4ff6-40d0. Ticket 3 (6777) round-3 BLOCK with 2 new findings: AC8 test needs enumerated invariants, and import_ndjson.py silently skips missing ticket_id/ticket_type rather than schema-validating -- remediating now.
